task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening the baseline dialog and setting the baseline for the project, or baseline indicators appearing in the Gantt chart.

task_completion.description: Update the project status date to February 10, 2025
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the project status date being set to February 10, 2025 in the project information or status dialog.

task_completion.description: Record 100% completion for 6 tasks and 70% completion for 2 tasks
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show task progress being updated in the software. Due to an environment bug, the agent may update construction tasks (UIDs 1-8) instead of the requested software tasks. Look for 100% completion on the first 6 tasks and 70% on the next 2 tasks.

task_completion.description: Export an Earned Value report to ~/Projects/earned_value_report.pdf
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent generating an Earned Value report and saving/exporting it as a PDF named 'earned_value_report.pdf' in the ~/Projects directory.

task_completion.description: Save the updated project file to ~/Projects/project_status_update.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using 'Save As' to save the project as 'project_status_update.xml' in the ~/Projects directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the project management software GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a project management application (like ProjectLibre or similar), not just terminal commands modifying XML files.

integrity.description: The PDF report was genuinely exported from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the software's print or export dialog being used to create the PDF, rather than a terminal command creating a dummy file.

integrity.description: The XML file was saved via the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Save As' dialog in the project management software being used to save the XML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Due to an environment setup bug, the project file 'sample_project.xml' contains a 'Commercial Construction' template instead of the requested 'Enterprise Software Development Project'. The requested software tasks do not exist. The agent may adapt by updating the first 8 construction tasks (UIDs 1-8) to the requested completion percentages (100% for the first 6, 70% for the next 2). If the agent does this, score the progress as correct. The expected status date is 2025-02-10. The project must be saved to /home/ga/Projects/project_status_update.xml and the report to /home/ga/Projects/earned_value_report.pdf.
